news.title: Oil Futures Rise as Deal With Iran Remains Elusive
news.summary: Oil futures add to yesterday's gains as the longer the U.S. and Iran take to reach agreement to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, the tighter the physical market becomes.  President Trump posted that talks have been going on continuously the past five days, including today, and again called on Iran to make a deal.  The supply situation is manageable for now, but higher summer demand in July and August is likely to lead to rationing, says Baron Lamarre, former head of trading at Petronas.
